tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(19,1): error TLUA2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(22,11): error TLUA2339: Property 'y' does not exist on type '{ x: number; }'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(26,1): error TLUA7053: Element implicitly has an 'any' type because expression of type 'string' can't be used to index type '{}'.
  No index signature with a parameter of type 'string' was found on type '{}'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(29,8): error TLUA2339: Property 'x' does not exist on type '{}'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(32,11): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'member'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(33,20): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'member'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(37,27): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'member'.
tluaTableAugmentation.tlua(39,18): error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'member'.


==== tluaTableAugmentation.tlua (8 errors) ====
    local M = {};
    local before: number | string = M.x;
    M.x = 1;
    M.x = "two";
    local x: number | string = M.x;
    
    local nested = {};
    nested.sub = {};
    nested.sub.value = 1;
    local value: number = nested.sub.value;
    
    local keyed = {};
    keyed["name"] = true;
    keyed[1] = "one";
    local name: boolean = keyed.name;
    local one: string = keyed[1];
    
    local fixed = { x = 1 };
    fixed.x = "no";
    ~~~~~~~

    annotated.y = 2;
              ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'y' does not exist on type '{ x: number; }'.

    local key = "key";
    dynamic[key] = 1;
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~

    local closed = true and {} or {};
    closed.x = 1;

    collision.member = 1;
